game_name: Jordan vs. Bird: One on One

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Defines available minigame opportunities and play style
Core gameplay loop of ball possession, passing, shooting, defense
Specialized dunk execution mechanics for Jordan

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Turn-based possession exchanges with continuous dribble/shot attempts within each possession; minigames provide focused tension spikes

difficulty_curve.early_game: Learning player character's movement and shooting mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Competitive one-on-one possession exchanges; increasing opponent defensive pressure
difficulty_curve.late_game: Close scoring scenarios; minigame precision under pressure
notable_spikes: Minigame execution requiring timing and precision
Final possession moments with score tied or opponent leading

notable_level_patterns.description: Single basketball court arena hosting continuous one-on-one play; no level progression structure. Player faces opponent in repeating possession cycles
Context-switching from court play to specialized skill minigames (slam dunk or three-point contest) that break main rhythm and test specific mechanics
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Jordan dunk contest / Bird three-point contest

sources_used: Wikipedia - Jordan vs. Bird: One on One
